name: Death & Afterlife
description: Sources on death, the afterlife, funerary texts, and the soul's journey after death from multiple traditions.

sources.garuda-purana: Garuda Purana (abridged) — Hindu death rites and reincarnation
sources.tibetan-book-of-dead: The Tibetan Book of the Dead (Penguin ed.) — Bardo teachings
sources.hornung-egyptian-afterlife: Erik Hornung — The Ancient Egyptian Books of the Afterlife
sources.egyptian-afterlife-papers: Collection of academic papers on Egyptian afterlife (Pyramid Texts, Coffin Texts, Book of the Dead)
